texto: ...a small stream...sings a carefree song as it runs by your house. It is so nonthreatening that you can sit by it, look at your reflection in the water, and even wash your hands in it. It is yours, your personal stream. Yet you know that it has originated in the sea and is on its way back to where it has come from. When passing by your house, however, it is yours. You can say it is a personal moment you have torn out of eternity to keep in your pocket for yourself.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Fatemeh Keshavarz sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. A afirmação “...a small stream...sings a carefree song as it runs by your house. It is so nonthreatening that …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a tempo, life-philosophy, metaphor, útil em momentos de metaphor e water.
